title: recall query spec
description:
Optional spec file for ``hpc-agent recall``.

The same arguments are exposed as CLI flags and the operator
picks one path. When ``root`` is omitted, recall falls back to
``~/.claude-hpc/config.json:experiment_roots`` — both empty
raises spec_invalid.

root.description: Filesystem directory to walk (recursively) for interview.json files.
root.title: Root

since.description: Only return campaigns with _materialized.at >= this ISO-8601 timestamp.
since.title: Since

limit.description: Cap on results returned. The total match count (pre-truncation) is reported via data.total_matching.
limit.title: Limit

include_runtime.description: Tier 2 rollup: walks each matched campaign's .hpc/runtimes/*.json and aggregates elapsed_sec + failure rate.
include_runtime.title: Include Runtime

include_generator_stats.description: Tier 3 rollup: buckets matched campaigns by task_generator.kind.
include_generator_stats.title: Include Generator Stats
